lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਪਿਰਹਿ ਮੇਲਾ ਹੋਇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਆਪਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: dhan pireh melaa hoe suaamee aap prabh kirapaa kare |
lines.english: The soul-bride meets her Husband Lord, when the Lord Master Himself showers His favor upon her.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਜਾ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਪਿਰ ਕੈ ਸਾਤ ਸਰ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਭਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sejaa suhaavee sang pir kai saat sar amrit bhare |
lines.english: Her bed is decorated in the company of her Beloved, and her seven pools are filled with ambrosial nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਦਇਆ ਮਇਆ ਦਇਆਲ ਸਾਚੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਓ ॥
lines.translit: kar deaa meaa deaal saache sabad mil gun gaavo |
lines.english: Be kind and compassionate to me, O Merciful True Lord, that I may obtain the Word of the Shabad, and sing Your Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਲੋਨੜੀਏ ਇਕ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਬਿਨੰਤੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: mundh sehaj salonarree ik prem binantee raam |
lines.english: O bride of natural beauty, offer your loving prayers to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕਾ ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਬਿਗਸੀ ਮੁੰਧ ਮਨਿ ਓਮਾਹਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanakaa har var dekh bigasee mundh man omaaho |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, gazing upon her Husband Lord, the soul-bride is delighted, and her mind is filled with joy. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪ੍ਰੇਮਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੰਤੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਸੁਖਿ ਵਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh prem raatee har binantee naam har kai sukh vasai |
lines.english: Imbued with the Love of God, I pray to the Lord, and through the Lord's Name, I abide in peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੰਗਮਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: mai man tan har bhaavai prabh sangam raatee raam |
lines.english: The Lord is pleasing to my mind and body; I am intoxicated in my Lord God's Company.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਗੁਣ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ਤਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਗੁਣਹ ਵਸਿ ਅਵਗਣ ਨਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: tau gun pachhaaneh taa prabh jaaneh gunah vas avagan nasai |
lines.english: If you recognize His Glorious Virtues, then you shall come to know God; thus virtue shall dwell in you, and sin shall run away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਬਾਝੁ ਇਕੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਰਹਿ ਨ ਸਾਕਾ ਕਹਣਿ ਸੁਨਣਿ ਨ ਧੀਜਏ ॥
lines.translit: tudh baajh ik til reh na saakaa kehan sunan na dheeje |
lines.english: Without You, I cannot survive, even for an instant; by merely talking and listening about You, I am not satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕਾ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਪੁਕਾਰੇ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਿ ਮਨੁ ਭੀਜਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanakaa priau priau kar pukaare rasan ras man bheeje |2|
lines.english: Nanak proclaims, "O Beloved, O Beloved!" His tongue and mind are drenched with the Lord's sublime essence. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਖੀਹੋ ਸਹੇਲੜੀਹੋ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਵਣਜਾਰਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sakheeho sahelarreeho meraa pir vanajaaraa raam |
lines.english: O my companions and friends, my Husband Lord is the merchant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੋੁ ਵਣੰਜੜਿਆ ਰਸਿ ਮੋਲਿ ਅਪਾਰਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: har naamo vananjarriaa ras mol apaaraa raam |
lines.english: I have purchased the Lord's Name; its sweetness and value are unlimited.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਲਿ ਅਮੋਲੋ ਸਚ ਘਰਿ ਢੋਲੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਮੁੰਧ ਭਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: mol amolo sach ghar dtolo prabh bhaavai taa mundh bhalee |
lines.english: His value is invaluable; the Beloved dwells in His true home. If it is pleasing to God, then He blesses His bride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥ ਸ੍ਰੀਧਰ ਆਪਿ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਸਾਰਏ ॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran samarath sreedhar aap kaaraj saare |
lines.english: The Creator, the Cause of causes, the All-powerful Lord Himself arranges our affairs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਕਰਹਿ ਰਲੀਆ ਹਉ ਪੁਕਾਰੀ ਦਰਿ ਖਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik sang har kai kareh raleea hau pukaaree dar khalee |
lines.english: Some enjoy sweet pleasures with the Lord, while I stand crying at His door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਧਨ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਭ ਸਾਧਾਰਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree dhan sohaagan sabad abh saadhaare |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, blessed is the soul-bride, upon whom He casts His Glance of Grace; she enshrines the Word of the Shabad in her heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਘਰਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਸੋਹਿਲੜਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਇਅੜੇ ਮੀਤਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: ham ghar saachaa sohilarraa prabh aaeiarre meetaa raam |
lines.english: In my home, the true songs of rejoicing resound; the Lord God, my Friend, has come to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਮਨੁ ਦੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਲੀਆ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: aapanaa man deea har var leea jiau bhaavai tiau raave |
lines.english: I gave my mind, and obtained the Lord as my Husband; as it pleases His Will, He enjoys me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਵੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੜਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਲੀਅੜਾ ਦੀਤਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: raave rang raatarriaa man leearraa deetaa raam |
lines.english: He enjoys me, and imbued with His Love, I have captivated His heart, and given mine to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਪਿਰ ਆਗੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਭਾਗੈ ਘਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: tan man pir aagai sabad sabhaagai ghar amrit fal paave |
lines.english: I have placed my body and mind before my Husband Lord, and through the Shabad, I have been blessed. Within the home of my own self, I have obtained the ambrosial fruit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੁਧਿ ਪਾਠਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਹੁ ਚਤੁਰਾਈਐ ਭਾਇ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: budh paatth na paaeeai bahu chaturaaeeai bhaae milai man bhaane |
lines.english: He is not obtained by intellectual recitation or great cleverness; only by love does the mind obtain Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਮੀਤ ਹਮਾਰੇ ਹਮ ਨਾਹੀ ਲੋਕਾਣੇ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tthaakur meet hamaare ham naahee lokaane |4|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord Master is my Best Friend; I am not an ordinary person. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੋ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਲਾਲ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: meraa mano meraa man raataa laal piaare raam |
lines.english: My mind, my mind is imbued with the Love of my Darling Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਹਦੋ ਅਨਹਦੁ ਵਾਜੈ ਰੁਣ ਝੁਣਕਾਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: anahado anahad vaajai run jhunakaare raam |
lines.english: The unstruck melody of the sound current resounds with the vibrations of the celestial instruments.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਮਨੁ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਸੁੰਨ ਮੰਡਲਿ ਘਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: anadin raataa man bairaagee sun manddal ghar paaeaa |
lines.english: Night and day, my detached mind remains absorbed in the Lord, and I obtain my home in the profound trance of the celestial void.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਪਰੰਪਰੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aad purakh aparanpar piaaraa satigur alakh lakhaaeaa |
lines.english: The True Guru has revealed to me the Primal Lord, the Infinite, my Beloved, the Unseen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਅਨਹਦ ਰੁਣ ਝੁਣਕਾਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate bairaagee anahad run jhunakaare |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the detached ones are imbued with His Name, the unstruck melody, and the celestial vibrations. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਣਿ ਬੈਸਣਿ ਥਿਰੁ ਨਾਰਾਇਣੁ ਤਿਤੁ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aasan baisan thir naaraaein tith man raataa veechaare |
lines.english: The Lord's posture and His seat are permanent; my mind is absorbed in reflective contemplation upon Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਅਗਮ ਤਿਤੁ ਅਗਮ ਪੁਰੇ ਕਹੁ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾਈਐ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: tit agam tith agam pure kahu kit bidh jaaeeai raam |
lines.english: Tell me, how can I reach that unreachable, that unreachable city?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਈਐ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਈਐ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਣੀ ਨਿਧਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: sach sabad kamaaeeai nij ghar jaaeeai paaeeai gunee nidhaanaa |
lines.english: Practicing the True Word of the Shabad, one comes to the home of his own inner being, and obtains the treasure of virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸੰਜਮੋ ਸਾਰਿ ਗੁਣਾ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਈਐ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sach sanjamo saar gunaa gurasabad kamaaeeai raam |
lines.english: By practicing truthfulness and self-restraint, by contemplating His Glorious Virtues, and living the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਸੰਜਮ ਥਾਕੀ ਹਠਿ ਨਿਗ੍ਰਹਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap kar kar sanjam thaakee hatth nigreh nahee paaeeai |
lines.english: Practicing intensive meditation, chanting and self-discipline, people have grown weary; stubbornly practicing these rituals, they still have not found Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਸਾਖਾ ਮੂਲੁ ਪਤੁ ਨਹੀ ਡਾਲੀ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਭਨਾ ਪਰਧਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: tit saakhaa mool pat nahee ddaalee sir sabhanaa paradhaanaa |
lines.english: He has no stems, roots, leaves or branches, but He is the Supreme Lord over the heads of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਜਗਜੀਵਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਈਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sehaj mile jagajeevan satigur boojh bujhaaeeai |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, through spiritual wisdom, the Lord, the Life of the world, is met; the True Guru imparts this understanding. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਗਰੋ ਰਤਨਾਗਰੁ ਤਿਤੁ ਰਤਨ ਘਣੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: gur saagaro ratanaagar tith ratan ghanere raam |
lines.english: The Guru is the ocean, the mountain of jewels, overflowing with jewels.
